comments.comment: 88% of the particulate matter released in 2024 was from the Dryer stack. This is based on the testing done by a third party annually. The result may vary if they dryer and/or heat exchanger have debris built up inside on the day of testing. In 2025 we have put together an initiative for more frequent cleaning of this equipment.

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: Reporting of pollutants are on a voluntary basis as levels are low. No immediate need for prevention activities.
